class.name: CassieTriangulator
class.brief_description: Fills a closed 3D boundary curve with a triangulated mesh.
class.description:
Takes an ordered sequence of 3D boundary points and returns a triangulated patch that spans them. The pipeline runs in three stages: MingCurve edge-protection, DMWT optimal triangulation (Ming Zou et al., SGP 2013), then pmp uniform remeshing.
For a three-point boundary the DMWT stage is skipped; pmp remeshing runs directly on the input triangle.
[codeblock] var boundary := PackedVector3Array([ Vector3(0, 0, 0), Vector3(1, 0, 0), Vector3(0.5, 0, 0.866), ]) var result := CassieTriangulator.triangulate(boundary, 0.1) if result["success"]: var mesh := ArrayMesh.new() var arr := [] arr.resize(Mesh.ARRAY_MAX) arr[Mesh.ARRAY_VERTEX] = result["vertices"] arr[Mesh.ARRAY_INDEX] = result["faces"] mesh.add_surface_from_arrays(Mesh.PRIMITIVE_TRIANGLES, arr) [/codeblock]
Geogram PDEL3d handles Delaunay tetrahedralization internally. The boundary points should be roughly evenly spaced; use [CassiePath3D] to resample before calling [method triangulate] if they are not.

link.title: An Algorithm for Triangulating Multiple 3D Polygons (Zou et al., SGP 2013)
CASSIE: Curve And Surface Sketching in Immersive Environments (Yu et al., CHI 2021)

method.name: triangulate
method.description:
Triangulates a closed 3D boundary and returns a [Dictionary] with three keys: [br]- [code]"success"[/code] ([bool]): [code]false[/code] if the boundary has fewer than three points or the DMWT stage fails. [br]- [code]"vertices"[/code] ([PackedVector3Array]): output mesh vertices. May include interior points inserted by the remesher. [br]- [code]"faces"[/code] ([PackedInt32Array]): triangle indices into [code]"vertices"[/code], three per triangle.
[param boundary] must be ordered (either CW or CCW) when projected onto the surface it lies on. Winding determines which side the normals face. [param target_edge_length] controls remeshing density; smaller values produce finer meshes at higher cost.
